title: runtime: don't set empty XDG_ variables
body:
They're most likely empty when running as root and setting them to empty
values can cause issues for some runtimes.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] as existing tests should continue to pass.

Fixes: #12142
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

Ouch, let me grab a dearly needed coffee and give it another shot.
Probably better to let the runtimes deal with it. It has been fixed in runsc in the meantime.

> Probably better to let the runtimes deal with it. It has been fixed in runsc in the meantime.

But there is no such behavior in docker, should we reconsider?
